summary: Iteration 173 — Mobile Responsiveness Testing for NormaFacile 2.0. All responsive features verified working correctly. Tested DashboardLayout (hamburger menu, mobile sidebar overlay), DiarioProduzione (mobile action buttons, responsive phase cards), and CommessaHubPage (icon-only buttons on mobile, responsive info card). Backend health check passed. Webpack compiles with only eslint warnings (no errors).
critical_code_review_comments: DashboardLayout.js: Correct implementation of 'hidden lg:flex' for desktop sidebar (line 322) and 'lg:hidden' for hamburger (line 340)
DashboardLayout.js: Mobile sidebar overlay correctly uses data-testid attributes for testing (open-mobile-menu, mobile-sidebar-overlay, close-mobile-menu)
DiarioProduzione.js: Mobile action buttons use correct 'hidden sm:flex' / 'flex sm:hidden' toggle pattern (lines 235-251 vs 258-274)
DiarioProduzione.js: Session dialog properly sized for mobile with 'max-w-md w-[95vw] sm:w-full' (line 371)
DiarioProduzione.js: Touch-friendly inputs with 'h-10 sm:h-9 text-base sm:text-sm' (lines 382-387)
CommessaHubPage.js: Header buttons correctly show icons only on mobile via 'hidden sm:inline' for labels (lines 267, 272-279)
CommessaHubPage.js: Info card uses 'flex-col sm:flex-row' for responsive stacking (line 286)
CommessaHubPage.js: Compact KPIs with 'p-1.5 sm:p-2' and 'text-xs sm:text-sm' (lines 506-519)

test_credentials.note: Test data auto-created and cleaned up

seed_data_creation: Created test user, session, and commessa with 6 production phases for mobile testing. All cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile responsiveness verified for DashboardLayout, DiarioProduzione, and CommessaHubPage. Key breakpoints: sm (640px) for DiarioProduzione/CommessaHub, lg (1024px) for DashboardLayout sidebar. All data-testid attributes in place for automated testing.

DiarioProduzione: Phase cards render correctly at mobile width (390px)
Mobile action buttons visible when phase expanded ('Avvia Fase', 'Registra Lavoro')
Session dialog usable at mobile width with touch-friendly inputs
Compact phase headers with 'gap-1.5 sm:gap-2' spacing
CommessaHubPage: Header buttons show icons only on mobile (34x32px buttons)
Full labels on desktop ('Collega Modulo', 'QR Code', 'Dossier PDF')
Info card stacks vertically on mobile
Compact KPIs in 3-column grid with smaller padding
